privileged_info_summary: Verified that the LDT data is synthetically generated dynamically using a lognormal distribution for reaction times. Confirmed that 'sub-999' is explicitly injected as a contaminated participant with zero variance (400ms fixed RTs) and 'sub-01' is forced to 100% accuracy in the Word_HighFreq condition to test edge correction. The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/pebl/analysis/ez_diffusion_report.json.
